---
title: "Kuntavaalit 2025"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: [litera, custom.scss]
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" href="favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: house
        href: ../index.html
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

data <- readRDS("df.rds")

party_colors <- c(
  "SDP" = "#F54B4B",
  "KOK" = "#003A54",
  "KESK" = "#3BAD2E",
  "VIHR" = "#76B72A",
  "VAS" = "#F00A64",
  "PS" = "#002395",
  "RKP" = "#ffdc5d",
  "KD" = "#118DFF",
  "LIIK" = "#cf83c8",
  "Muut" = "#000000"
)

party_data <- data |>
  group_by(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi) |>
  summarise(total_votes = sum(aanet_yhteensa_lkm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(percentage = (total_votes / sum(total_votes)) * 100) |>
  arrange(desc(total_votes)) |>
  head(10) |>
  mutate(
    label = paste0(format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %")
  )

party_data <- party_data |>
  mutate(party_bold = paste0("<b>", puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, "</b>"))
```

## Chart

```{r}
plot_ly(party_data,
        x = ~percentage,
        y = ~reorder(party_bold, percentage),
        type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        color = ~puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi,
        colors = party_colors,
        hovertext = ~paste0(puolueen_ryhman_nimilyhenne_suomeksi, ": ",
                    format(round(percentage, 1), decimal.mark = ","), " %",
                    "<br>Ääniä yhteensä: ", 
                    format(total_votes, big.mark = " ")),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "white",
      bordercolor = "#1a1a1a",
      font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", 
                  family = "Outfit, sans-serif",
                  size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", 
             range = c(0, max(party_data$percentage) * 1.3),
             showgrid = FALSE,
             showline = FALSE,
             zeroline = FALSE,
             showticklabels = FALSE,
             title = ""),
    yaxis = list(title = "",
             showgrid = FALSE,
             showline = FALSE,
             zeroline = FALSE,
             ticklabelposition = "outside",
             ticklen = 10,
             tickcolor = "white",
             tickfont = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 14, 
                             family = "Outfit, sans-serif",
                             weight = "bold")),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
      annotations = lapply(1:nrow(party_data), function(i) {
      list(
        x = party_data$percentage[i],
        y = party_data$party_bold[i],
        text = paste0("<b>", party_data$label[i], "</b>"),
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        xshift = 5,
      font = list(color = "#1a1a1a", size = 13, 
                family = "Outfit, sans-serif")
  )
})
  )
```
